title: Internal response property conversion error
rationale: Response property references against non-object response types are invalid user-authored API definitions, so the converter now raises a non-reportable reference error instead of an internal error.
fixSummary: Classify non-object response property references as ReferenceError at the property conversion boundary.
problemSignature: IR conversion invariant failure while resolving response object properties; pagination response property references can point at a non-object response type.
